Join us for an exciting 2-day Web Development Bootcamp where you'll level up your basic HTML, CSS, and JavaScript skills and dive into the world of React JS! Whether you're a beginner or looking to enhance your skills, this workshop is perfect for you.
💻 What You'll Learn:
🌐 React JS basics: Create dynamic web apps.
✨ Hands-on coding sessions with real projects.
💡 Interactive lessons led by expert instructors.
This bootcamp is the perfect pre-event workshop for KEC LITE 2081, a astounding technical exhibition! 🎉
🗓 Date: 6th and 7th of December
📍 Location: Kantipur Engineering College,…

Hosted by Gaurav Giri

Welcome to Template Talk Vol. 0, the kickoff edition of our recurring series where we spotlight the five most useful Notion templates discovered across the marketplace. This introductory volume sets the stage for what’s ahead—curated picks, practical insights, and efficient systems you can immediately plug into your workflow.

Notion for Engineering Students: Sophomore Survival System
A beginner-friendly workshop for engineering freshman with little to no Notion experience. Learn how to use a ready-made Notion template designed for your coursework—track classes, assignments, exams, and resources all in one place. Stay organized, reduce stress, and build a productivity system that actually works.

Hosted by Notion@KEC

events.summary: ButwalHacks x Notion@KEC: Notion for Hackathon
events.description:
Get up-to-date information at: https://luma.com/8voinv7p?pk=g-kzfFuKjic7N3dbl

Address:
Lumbini World School
Tilottama, Lumbini Province
Nepal

Butwal Hacks is a one-day hackathon organized by students for under 18 participants, happening on January 17 in Butwal. As part of the event, Notion@KEC will conduct a beginner-friendly, in-person workshop to help participants organize ideas, manage tasks, and collaborate effectively using Notion. Participants will get hands-on experience with a custom hackathon Notion template, practical tips for teamwork, and exclusive swag. This workshop is designed to help participants maximize productivity and make the most of their hackathon experience.

Hosted by Gaurav Giri

Get ready to transform your 2026 productivity game! Join us for a hands-on session where we'll help you build a personal productivity system in Notion that actually sticks. Whether your current setup is chaotic or non-existent, we're diving into creating a second brain that'll keep you organized all year long.
We'll be setting up real systems together—think task management that doesn't overwhelm you, note-taking that makes sense, and a dashboard that becomes your daily command center. Bring your laptop, your 2026 goals (messy or polished), and get ready to leave with a Notion workspace you'll…

Hosted by Notion@KEC

events.summary: Build Your 2026 with Notion: 2026 Dashboard Workshop
events.description:
Get up-to-date information at: https://luma.com/event/evt-NbtJwjYX0GMJk0J?pk=g-Y0u1SU0S1nO3msq

Address:
Ujamaa koffie & bakery with library
Kathmandu, Bagmati Province
Nepal

Build Your 2026 / BY2026 is a 2–3 hour intermediate Notion workshop where we will design and build a personal dashboard based on what you are working on in 2026, like academics, internships, research, personal habits, or projects. We will cover a practical dashboard structure, set up key databases (goals, projects, and weekly planning), create views (board, calendar, and list), and add a simple weekly review so your system stays useful after the session.

Hosted by Gaurav Giri
